'''Polipe''' was a multi-tentacled alien who served as [[Booster Terrik]]'s co-pilot on the ''[[Pulsar Skate]]'' in the years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He and Booster kept [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] safe when the [[Bonestar Pirates]] destroyed the fuel depot operated by Wedge's parents on [[Gus Treta/Legends|Gus Treta]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
